headline: DeFi Hacks Down 30% Amid AI Fears

article.title: AI has not triggered DeFi ‘hackpocalypse,’ Dragonfly partner says
article.summary: Total value stolen and median hack size are declining compared to 2025, signaling that the AI hacking apocalypse was a false alarm, argued Dragonfly managing partner Haseeb Qureshi.

headline: $200K BTC Block Reward Claimed by Solo Miner

article.title: Hobby-level miner bags $200K solo BTC block with budget Bitaxe rig
article.summary: A solo Bitcoin miner secured a $200,000 block reward with a budget mining rig, pushing payouts to hobby-level miners to $4.7 million for the past year.

headline: US Stocks Fall 1% Ahead of CPI Data

article.title: US Stocks Slip as Bank Earnings Start Before CPI: Markets Wrap
article.summary: Stocks slipped as traders refrained from taking on risk on a busy day that kicked off with Wall Street earnings. Testimony from Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh and inflation data are due later.

headline: Fed Hike Odds Surge Ahead of Key Data

article.title: Fed Rate-Hike Bets Mount Before Inflation Data, Warsh Testimony
article.summary: Bond traders ramped up bets for a July interest-rate hike ahead of US inflation data and an appearance by the head of the Federal Reserve that stand to reinforce the need for action.

headline: $288M Seized Crypto Transferred to Coinbase Prime

article.title: US Government Moves $288M in Seized Crypto to Coinbase Prime
article.summary: The seized coins landed at the government's custodian, which stops short of a sale but has revived questions about Trump's no-sell pledge.

headline: GPT-5.6 Update Sinks Crypto 8% in 1 Hour

article.title: Stop Over-Prompting: OpenAI’s New GPT-5.6 Guidelines Change Everything
article.summary: Forget the XML blocks and persistence scripts. OpenAI’s new prompting guide says define the destination, set the stopping conditions, and get out of the way.

headline: UK Crypto Lending Now Tax Free: Zero Gain Rule

article.title: UK HMRC adopts ‘no gain, no loss’ tax treatment for crypto lending, liquidity pools
article.summary: HMRC adopts "no gain, no loss" treatment for certain crypto loans and liquidity pool transactions, deferring CGT until economic disposal.

headline: US Transfers $288M Seized Crypto to Coinbase

article.title: US government moves over $288 million in seized bitcoin, ether to Coinbase Prime: Arkham
article.summary: According to Arkham, U.S. government wallets maintain a large crypto portfolio estimated at over $20 billion, including 324,552 BTC.

article.summary: Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan, Bank of America, Citigroup and Wells Fargo all have results on Tuesday

headline: Dollar Plunges 2% Amid US Diplomatic Crisis

article.summary: America’s diplomats used to have global sway. Now they are besieged by their own president
